zh.lifeSummary: 當George Royle於1586年9月29日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾福利斯頓時，他的父親Raphe Royle II19歲，母親Ellin Milnes17歲。他於大約1605年與Lady Dorothy Jane Poynton在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1625年12月在英國英格蘭藍卡爾埃克爾斯享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Royle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Royal  .

variants.name: Royal
meanings: English: habitational name from Royle in Burnley (Lancashire), so named from Old English rā ‘roe deer’ + hyll ‘hill’. The surname may have been confused with Rial .
Americanized form of German   Reul   or   Reule  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of Spanish and Portuguese   Real  .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When George Royle was born on 29 September 1586, in Flixton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Raphe Royle II, was 19 and his mother, Ellin Milnes, was 17. He married Lady Dorothy Jane Poynton about 1605, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died in December 1625, in Eccles, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Royle est né le 29 septembre 1586, à Flixton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Raphe Royle II, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Ellin Milnes, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lady Dorothy Jane Poynton environ 1605, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en décembre 1625, à Eccles, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

Er hat um 1605 in Lancashire, England Lady Dorothy Jane Poynton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1625 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Eccles, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: George Royleが1586年9月29日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアフリクストンで生まれた時，父Raphe Royle IIは19歳，母Ellin Milnesは17歳であった。約1605年にイギリスランカシュアイアでLady Dorothy Jane Poyntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1625年12月にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアエククレスで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: George Royle(이)가 1586년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 플릭스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raphe Royle II(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellin Milnes(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1605년 영국 랭카실르에서 Lady Dorothy Jane Poynton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1625년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 c클스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Royle родился 29 сентября 1586 г. в местности фликстон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Raphe Royle II было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellin Milnes, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Dorothy Jane Poynton около 1605 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер декабрь 1625 г. в местности экклесь, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.
